_comment_top: THIS FILE IS THE CALENDAR. Adding a new event = adding a new block in the events array below. Save the file, push, the site updates. See how-to-add-events.md for the field-by-field walkthrough.

events.title: May Dinner at Vern's House with Westwoods BBQ
events.description: Monthly region dinner hosted at Vern's. Westwoods BBQ is catering, so come hungry. Bring the Porsche if the weather is right, otherwise bring yourself and an appetite. RSVP required so we know how much food to order.

events.title: Cars and Coffee South Valley
events.description: Last Saturday cars and coffee, South Valley edition. Free to attend. No RSVP needed but tap the button below if you want a text reminder the morning of.

events.title: Cars and Coffee at Sanctuary
events.description: First Saturday cars and coffee at Sanctuary in Fresno. Anyone is welcome. Park up, grab a coffee, talk cars.

events.title: Cedar Grove Driving Tour
events.description: Driving tour up to Cedar Grove. Full route, meet point, and lunch stop will be sent by email and SMS the week before. RSVP early so we can plan the regroup points.
